dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - April 16, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**Nationals Stun Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**

The Washington Nationals outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates 8-7 behind a strong performance from James Wood, who singled to score Jorbit Vivas in the key game detail. Marcell Ozuna led the Nationals' offense, going 1-for-4 with a home run and 3 RBIs. On the mound, Braxton Ashcraft pitched 5.2 innings, striking out 7 and allowing 2 earned runs. Clayton Beeter earned the win for the Nationals.

In other action, the San Francisco Giants dominated the Cincinnati Reds 3-0 behind a strong outing from Jung Hoo Lee, who went 3-for-4 with 1 RBI. Landen Roupp pitched 6 scoreless innings, allowing just 1 hit while striking out 6.

The Los Angeles Angels routed the New York Yankees 11-4, led by Jo Adell's grand slam in the 4th inning. Adell finished 2-for-4 with 4 RBIs, while Sam Bachman pitched 3 scoreless innings to start the game.

The Tampa Bay Rays edged the Chicago White Sox 5-3, with Junior Caminero hitting a home run and driving in 1 run. Kevin Kelly earned the win in relief, striking out 3 in 1.2 innings.

The Texas Rangers defeated the Athletics 9-6 behind a 3-hit performance from Josh Jung, who hit a home run and drove in 2 runs. Cal Quantrill earned the win, pitching 6 innings and striking out 5.

The Cleveland Guardians topped the Baltimore Orioles 4-2, with José Ramírez hitting a home run and driving in 2 runs. Parker Messick pitched 8 strong innings, striking out 9 and allowing 2 earned runs.

The Colorado Rockies edged the Houston Astros 3-2, with Hunter Goodman hitting a home run and driving in 1 run. Chase Dollander pitched 5.1 scoreless innings, striking out 9 and allowing just 1 hit.

Finally, the San Diego Padres defeated the Seattle Mariners 5-2 behind a strong outing from Walker Buehler, who pitched 5 scoreless innings and struck out 7. Fernando Tatis Jr. hit an RBI single to cap the scoring.
